seriesTitle: LLM Safety & Red-Teaming for QA Leaders
seriesDescription: Practical articles on a regular cadence for QA leaders building LLM safety and red-teaming practice.

articles.title: The Red-Team Evidence Package: What to Log Beyond Screenshots
articles.summary: QA leaders need artifacts Security and Legal can reuse. Here is a minimum viable logging checklist for one adversarial session.

articles.title: The 40-Prompt Production Gate
articles.summary: First sprint: eight adversarial families, forty prompts, scoring rubric, and production gate thresholds.
